textByHash.1ddd9d98ef5d47ddf7cfee01783703ec07d6f826: Arr, I can help ye with yer business wi'out ye needin' to known mine. So are ye seekin' him, or not?
textByHash.465ca8e9ae338666306245aecd78e7514f6483ed: Many come here seekin' him. They be all lost an 'confused. If ye be seekin' him now, maybe I can help ye.
textByHash.4e4d6e7fe8720597e28d5c171186a523af14c1c6: Arrr, I thought maybe ye were.
textByHash.822124ddd75f73b60e7d5df5bfa82c8d3779341a: Lookin' fer the Corsair cabin boy?
textByHash.cd96f55b6567c83b470ef8fc6760a58852342ac9: The Corsairs moor their ship away to the west, beyond yon village of Rimmington. Ye should look fer him there.
